# rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method { #skrom.rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method }

`rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method`



## Classes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [EmpiricalCubatureMethod](#skrom.rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod) | This class selects a subset of elements and corresponding positive weights necessary for the construction of a hyper-reduced order model |

### EmpiricalCubatureMethod { #skrom.rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod }

```python
rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod(
    ECM_tolerance=0,
    Filter_tolerance=0,
    Plotting=False,
    MaximumNumberUnsuccesfulIterations=100,
)
```

This class selects a subset of elements and corresponding positive weights necessary for the construction of a hyper-reduced order model
Reference: Local-ECM: An empirical cubature hyper-reduction method adapted to local reduced order models." arXiv preprint arXiv:2310.15769 (2023)"

#### Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [Calculate](#skrom.rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod.Calculate) | Method calculating the elements and weights, after the Initialize method was performed |
| [Initialize](#skrom.rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod.Initialize) | Method performing calculations required before launching the Calculate method |
| [Run](#skrom.rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod.Run) | Method launching the element selection algorithm to find a set of elements: self.z, and weights: self.w |
| [SetUp](#skrom.rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod.SetUp) | Method for setting up the element selection |

##### Calculate { #skrom.rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod.Calculate }

```python
rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod.Calculate()
```

Method calculating the elements and weights, after the Initialize method was performed

##### Initialize { #skrom.rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod.Initialize }

```python
rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod.Initialize()
```

Method performing calculations required before launching the Calculate method

##### Run { #skrom.rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod.Run }

```python
rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod.Run()
```

Method launching the element selection algorithm to find a set of elements: self.z, and weights: self.w

##### SetUp { #skrom.rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod.SetUp }

```python
rom.ecm.empirical_cubature_method.EmpiricalCubatureMethod.SetUp(
    G,
    Weights,
    constrain_sum_of_weights=False,
    InitialCandidatesSet=None,
    use_L2_weighting=False,
)
```

Method for setting up the element selection
input:  ResidualsBasis: numpy array containing a basis to the residuals projected
